'''√j-p-h''' ('''kajapah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:curvet|curvet]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-p-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:curvet|curvet]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √j-p-h
|-
! Lemma
| kajapah
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thijapah || jijapah || shijapah || kijapah
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthujapah || jujujapah || shushujapah || kukujapah
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thujapah || jujapah || shujapah || kujapah
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thujapah || jujapah || shujapah || kujapah
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thejapah || jejapah || shejapah || kejapah
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothojapah || jojojapah || shoshojapah || kokojapah
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thojapah || jojapah || shojapah || kojapah
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thojapah || jojapah || shojapah || kojapah
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || japah || japah || japah || japah
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || japah || japah || japah || japah
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || japah || japah || japah || japah
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || japah || japah || japah || japah
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæjapah || jæjapah || shæjapah || kæjapah
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathajapah || jajajapah || shashajapah || kakajapah
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thajapah || jajapah || shajapah || kajapah
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thajapah || jajapah || shajapah || kajapah
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shajapah
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshajapah
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishajapah
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shajapahnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshajapahnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishajapahnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shajapahshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshajapahnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishajapahshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shajapahro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshajapahnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishajapahro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shajapahmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshajapahnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishajapahmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shajapahsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshajapahnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishajapahsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shajapahng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshajapahnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishajapahng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shajapahya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshajapahnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishajapahya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shajapahyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshajapahnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishajapahyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shajapahnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshajapahnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishajapahnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shajapahnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshajapahnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishajapahnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shajapahnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshajapahnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishajapahnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shajapahshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshajapahnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishajapahshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shajapahshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshajapahnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishajapahshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shajapahshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshajapahnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishajapahshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shajapahronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshajapahnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishajapahronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shajapahroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshajapahnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishajapahroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shajapahromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshajapahnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishajapahromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shajapahmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshajapahnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishajapahmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shajapahmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshajapahnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishajapahmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shajapahmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshajapahnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishajapahmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
